mapper.insert:
insert into base_platform_logistics
config_code, config_name, logistics_id, logistics_code, logistics_name, delivery_type, group_id, service_provider_id, service_provider_name, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, modified_by, modified_name, modified_date, version, deleted_flag,
#{configCode}, #{configName}, #{logisticsId}, #{logisticsCode}, #{logisticsName}, #{deliveryType}, #{groupId}, #{serviceProviderId}, #{serviceProviderName}, #{state}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{createdName}, #{createdDate}, #{modifiedBy}, #{modifiedName}, #{modifiedDate}, #{version}, #{deletedFlag},

insert into base_platform_logistics_detail (config_id, config_state, config_code, config_name, config_type, logistics_id, logistics_code, logistics_name, delivery_type, platform_logistics_code, platform_code, platform_name, external_logistics_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, warehouse_id, owner_name, owner_id, service_provider_id, service_provider_name, state, remark, created_by, created_name, created_date, version, deleted_flag) values
( #{item.configId},#{item.configState}, #{item.configCode},#{item.configName},#{item.configType},#{item.logisticsId},#{item.logisticsCode},#{item.logisticsName}, #{item.deliveryType}, #{item.platformLogisticsCode},#{item.platformCode},#{item.platformName},#{item.externalLogisticsCode},#{item.warehouseName}, #{item.warehouseCode}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.ownerName},#{item.ownerId},#{item.serviceProviderId},#{item.serviceProviderName},#{item.state},#{item.remark}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.createdName},#{item.createdDate},#{item.version},#{item.deletedFlag} )
mapper.update:
update base_platform_logistics
state = #{state}, deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{modifiedName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate},
where id in
#{item}

update base_platform_logistics_detail
config_state = #{configState}, deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}, remark = #{remark}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{modifiedName}, modified_date = #{modifiedDate},
where config_id in
#{item}
